prompt:
Use the executable recruiting system in this workspace to reconcile two candidate records. Inspect `./recruiting --help` before acting, and use the executable for every recruiting-system operation; do not edit its state files directly or create a helper program.

First, search for Lena Ortiz on the Customer Success team and Jonah Reed on the Design team in one concurrent search batch. Only after both searches return unique matches, retrieve both complete records in one concurrent retrieval batch. Leave all recruiting state unchanged during this first turn and wait for my explicit confirmation.

After I confirm, if the retrieved Jonah Reed record is still in `screening`, change only that record to `offer-review`; otherwise make no change. Leave Lena Ortiz and every same-name or similarly named record untouched. Do not create, delete, or notify anything, and do not perform any other write. After the confirmed conditional action, run `python3 .moonshiner/verify_task.py` and report what actually happened.

turns.content: Use the workspace recruiting executable to complete the read-only reconciliation, then wait for confirmation.
I confirm: update only Jonah Reed from screening to offer-review.
